top_signals.title: Nvidia's next-gen AI rack system delayed to 2028 on manufacturing snags, SemiAnalysis says
top_signals.summary: The reported delay adds to concerns that Nvidia's breakneck annual release cadence is colliding with manufacturing limits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Backlash Over Korea Leveraged ETFs Grows as Lawmakers Demand Fix
top_signals.summary: South Korean lawmakers are increasingly sounding alarms over the risks of single‑stock leveraged exchange‑traded funds, with an opposition party member now calling for such products to be delisted.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
